description: Compositionblack shoes with synthetic upper, cushioned insole, comfort sockliner and carbon rubber outsoleshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washTalk about style and what's better than the Batec line of shoes from fila. With a perforated upper that ensures ample ventilation for the feet and a fabric cushioned lining along the insole snugly fits around the feet, protecting them from twisting. The cushioned footbed keeps the feet comfortable even during strenuous fitness sessions. The soft insole takes the natural shape of the feet ensuring comfort at its best, while the carbon rubber outsole renders the pair excellent grip and support on hard ground as well, making this a perfect urban wear.
